overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets with wet reflective pavement, towering skyscrapers with digital billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's ray-traced lighting and detailed urban environment as the camera moves through a commercial district and stops to admire the architecture.

tall street light pole with overhead lamp

multi-lane road with cars driving past with headlights on

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a wet neon-lit sidewalk at night. Yellow warning banners line the right side while large digital billboards illuminate the left. The pavement reflects the colorful lights, and moderate traffic flows on the adjacent multi-lane road.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking past a building with a striking geometric diamond-patterned facade. Pedestrians appear ahead on the sidewalk, walking in the same direction. The warning banners and large billboards from the previous section fall behind as the street continues.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wider intersection area. A striking building with a colorful LED grid facade dominates the left side, while an elevated highway structure appears on the right. The sidewalk becomes busier with pedestrians, and an outdoor cafe with purple lighting becomes visible.

segments.scene_description: The camera stops walking and tilts upward to admire the massive skyscrapers towering overhead, then pans down to street level. The view shows traffic flowing under an elevated highway structure, with cars driving past on the wet reflective pavement. The colorful LED building remains visible to the left while the crosswalk markings appear in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a neon-drenched commercial district that evolves from a narrow sidewalk into a sprawling, towering urban intersection. It begins by moving along a wet pavement reflecting vibrant lights, passing yellow warning banners and large digital billboards that illuminate the night. As the camera progresses, the billboards fade behind a building with a geometric diamond-patterned facade while pedestrians appear ahead on the path. The scene then opens into a wider intersection dominated by a colorful LED grid building on the left and an elevated highway on the right, passing a purple-lit outdoor cafe. Finally, the camera comes to a halt and tilts upward to admire the massive skyscrapers overhead before panning back down to the flowing traffic and reflective crosswalks below.
